holdings.infoBox: GXLC is an equity ETF with a total of 504 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.43%, Apple at 6.58%, Microsoft at 4.31%, Amazon.com at 3.54%, and Alphabet at 3.30%.

overview.description: The Global X U.S. 500 ETF (GXLC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive GBS United States 500 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index comprised of US equity securities. The fund selects the largest securities by market cap. GXLC was launched on Sep 23, 2025 and is issued by Global X.
